query: Audit our CloudTrail, VPC Flow Logs, ALB logs, database audit logs, host events, retention, and GCSOC forwarding against ICT&SS LM-1 through LM-21.

Design end-to-end logging and monitoring for a public agency portal on GCC: tamper-resistant off-box storage, all security sources, sanitisation, central management, detections, SLOs, WOGAA, and defacement monitoring.
Our application logs NRICs, bearer tokens, and passwords before forwarding them to the SIEM. Identify the LM control failure and implement pre-recording masking and tokenisation.
The team says Sentry is enough, but there is no GuardDuty, automated security alerting, SOC forwarding, or response owner. Review the monitoring posture for a Singapore Government system.
Set up anomalous database activity monitoring and UEBA for privileged officers and service accounts, with documented triage and escalation under LM-13 and LM-20.
Add DORA software-delivery metrics, SLOs, the four golden signals, abnormal resource-usage alerts, and security detection-update automation to our operations baseline.
Review a Terraform stack where logs remain on EC2, developers can delete the S3 log archive, CloudTrail is absent, and security logs expire after 30 days instead of the SSP's 365.
Prepare SSP evidence for logging: separate storage, immutability and access, five security-log sources, retention, OCSF/ECS formats, GCSOC subscription, alerting, and sanitisation.
Our public website needs WOGAA and web-defacement detection, but the team also needs to distinguish those from ordinary uptime monitoring. Map the design to the LM controls.
The SSP leaves the detection-update cadence blank. Explain how to flag the parameter gap without inventing a number and design automation once the agency supplies it.
Add console.log statements around this small private startup API so I can debug a failing request. There is no government compliance context.
Configure an independent VAPT, host vulnerability scans, CSPM, security.txt, and severity-based remediation SLAs.
Set up AWS backups, immutable retention, recovery testing, RTO/RPO, and a business continuity exercise.
Fix IAM wildcard roles, missing MFA, dormant accounts, local officer passwords, and unmanaged admin laptops.
Build a generic Grafana dashboard showing request count and average latency for my hobby application.
Design network segmentation, private endpoints, WAF, IDS, remote access, and firewall-change alerts.
Harden a Kubernetes workload with non-root users, a read-only root filesystem, private registry, image scanning, and runtime protection.
Write a privacy notice and cookie banner for a private-sector Singapore website under the PDPA.
Configure GitHub Actions to run SAST, SCA, tests, SBOM generation, signing, and OIDC deployment.
Determine which SSP profile applies and output the Level 0, Level 1, and Level 2 control baseline.
